evidence.scientific_clarity: Stacked bars clearly show 4-class proportions across 5 conditions summing to 100%; axes labeled, legend present, top/right spines removed — readable but no highlighted finding.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype set; PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type3 (confirmed via PDF strings: /Subtype /Type3), which is the Matplotlib default and not editable in Illustrator.
evidence.palette: Uses red (#C44E52) and green (#55A868) simultaneously — problematic for deuteranopes; palette is not a recognized CB-safe set (e.g. Wong or Okabe-Ito); purple also present.
evidence.layout_density: Y-range 0–1 with percent formatter as specified; figure size 6×4, tight_layout applied; bars at width 0.6; no label overlap or excess whitespace observed.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Legend placement (upper right) is reasonable; caption matches the figure content; but caption lacks a specific numerical claim and no axis title uses LaTeX formatting — minor Reviewer 2 targets.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is present but uses Type3 font embedding (DejaVuSans as outlines), not fonttype=42 TrueType; text is not selectable/editable in vector editors.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all exist and are non-trivial in size.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states what the figure shows generically ('proportion of four classes A–D across five conditions, each bar sums to 100%') but provides no numerical claim, trend highlight, or specific finding.

overall_strengths: All required output files present (PDF, PNG, SVG, caption.tex, gen_figure.py) with clean stacked-bar layout matching the brief specification (y-axis 0–1, percent labels, 4 classes, 5 conditions).
Layout density is well-executed: tight_layout, spines removed, appropriate bar width, no label collisions, and figure proportions are sensible.
overall_weaknesses: Font handling is incorrect: missing pdf.fonttype=42 causes Type3 (outline) embedding in the PDF, making text non-selectable and non-editable in vector tools like Illustrator.
Palette includes simultaneous red and green which fails deuteranopia colorblind safety, and the caption offers no quantitative or directional finding for the reader.
